articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: Elon Musk’s last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI - TechCrunch
articles.description: All but two of Musk's 11 xAI co-founders departed before this week.
articles.content: Earlier this month, it looked like all but two of Elon Musks 11 co-founders at his AI startup xAI had departed the company. Now, according to Business Insider, the remaining two co-founders, Manuel K… [+829 chars]
